items.title: Anthropic Details How It Contains Claude Across Web, Code, and Cowork
items.summaryShort: Anthropic Details How It Contains Claude Across Web, Code, and Cowork. Anthropic detailed the containment architectures it uses for Claude across its products.

items.title: Presentation: From Copy-Paste to Composition: Building Agents Like Real Software
items.summaryShort: Presentation: From Copy-Paste to Composition: Building Agents Like Real Software. Jake Mannix discusses moving AI agents past chaotic "1970s BASIC" architectures.

items.title: Cascade raises $3.5M to help construction firms find and win projects
items.summaryShort: Cascade raises $3.5M to help construction firms find and win projects. a16z Speedrun, Ada Ventures, and Snowball VC have invested in Cascade's $3.5 million seed round.

items.title: The browser wars aren't about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
items.summaryShort: The browser wars aren't about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari. We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

items.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
items.summaryShort: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US. Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.
